title: MOAR guard villagers armor
description: Increases the chances of the villagers of guard villager of getting armor
body:
A datapack requested by bronze_1silver_95015(discord) that makes guard villagers from the Guard Villagers
mod have armor a lot more frequently.

Hope u guys like this small and niche datapack :3

ALSO, the icon of the villager with the hamer was taken from [this reddit page](https://www.reddit.com/r/minecraftsuggestions/comments/kypsxz/a_different_villager_profession_the_mayor/)
